overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Origins showing a hooded character exploring the interior of an ancient library. The character walks through corridors lined with scroll shelves and past scribes working at tables, stops to overlook an atrium, then continues through a grand hall with mosaic floors and towering statues.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient library corridor with scroll shelves and scribe tables

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the library corridor past scribes working at tables

notable_agents.action: scribe sitting at wooden table writing on papyrus scrolls

entered.detail: tall wooden shelves filled with rolled papyrus scrolls reaching to ceiling
massive carved stone columns with decorative capitals and red accents
long wooden tables with scrolls, ink pots, and writing implements
ornate red patterned carpet running down the corridor center
high arched windows with geometric lattice patterns letting in bright light

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a covered library corridor with a red carpet underfoot. To the right, tall wooden shelves hold countless scrolls, while to the left, scribes sit at long tables working on papyrus. Massive stone pillars line the left side, and light filters through high lattice windows.

events.description: character stops walking at balcony railing to look out over the lower level
character turns around away from balcony and prepares to continue walking

agents.ego_description: stopping at the stone balcony to look out over the lower atrium, then turning to continue

entered.detail: stone balustrade with decorative green panels overlooking the floor below
open lower level visible beneath with additional columns and architectural details

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the corridor and stops at a stone balcony railing, looking out over a lower atrium level. After a moment of observation, the character turns away from the overlook, with the stone pillars now directly beside them.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand library hall with mosaic floors and monumental statues

events.description: scene transitions via dissolve to grand hall with geometric mosaic floors and different architecture

agents.ego_description: walking through the expansive hall toward a large statue at the far end, passing other robed figures

notable_agents.action: robed figure walking ahead in the same direction toward the statue

entered.detail: intricate black and white geometric mosaic tile pattern covering the floor
massive seated statue on pedestal at the far end of the hall
tall wooden shelves with decorative metal grilles housing scrolls
second-level walkway with columns overlooking the main floor
classical marble statues and busts on pedestals along the walls

segments.scene_description: Following a transition, the character enters a vast grand hall with elaborate mosaic floors. The space features ornate scroll shelves behind metal grilles, classical marble busts, and an upper gallery level. The character walks toward a monumental seated statue at the far end while other figures move through the space.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a scholarly corridor that culminates in a panoramic view of a library atrium. It begins with the character walking along a red carpet, flanked by towering wooden scroll shelves on the right and scribes working at long tables beneath massive stone pillars on the left. As the character advances, light filters through high lattice windows, illuminating the path toward the end of the hall. The scene then shifts as the character reaches a stone balcony railing and pauses to look out over the lower atrium level. Finally, the camera pivots away from the overlook, bringing the heavy stone pillars back into immediate focus as the character turns to continue their journey.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as the character transitions from a narrow passage into the expansive openness of a monumental grand hall. It begins with the character stepping onto elaborate mosaic floors, where the surrounding space opens up to reveal ornate scroll shelves protected by metal grilles and classical marble busts. As the character advances, the perspective expands to encompass an upper gallery level and the movement of other figures within the vast interior. The scene then shifts its focus toward the far end of the hall, steadily closing the distance toward a monumental seated statue that dominates the horizon.
